title: Node Process, Event Loop, Modules, Configuration, and Lifecycle · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs node process, event loop, modules, configuration, and lifecycle from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the process, event-loop, configuration, and lifecycle state model. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for process, event-loop, configuration, and lifecycle state model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evi…
objectives: Trace call stack, timers, pending callbacks, poll, check, close callbacks, microtasks, and next-tick work without assuming one request owns one event-loop turn.
Configure ESM, CommonJS interop, package exports, file extensions, and NodeNext resolution without relying on accidental development-loader behavior.
Parse, validate, normalize, redact, and freeze configuration once before acquiring resources or accepting traffic.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Signal Drain Exit
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 8704 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to separate configuration, readiness, admission, and signal-driven draining; keep rollback safe during a storage expansion; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Handle termination signals with idempotent draining, bounded cleanup, rejection tracking, exit-code ownership, and forced-stop evidence.

Inspect the Signal Drain Exit trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Signal Drain Exit.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for handle termination signals with idempotent draining, bounded cleanup, rejection tracking, exit-code ownership, and forced-stop evidence. For Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Signal Drain Exit, keep Signal Drain Exit connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
